name: Community Bank And Trust
description_short: Community Bank & Trust is a full-service bank offering personal and business banking products including mortgages, installment loans, checking accounts, and mobile banking services.
description_long: Community Bank & Trust Company operates as a traditional community bank with multiple branch locations and a digital presence at cbthomebank.com. The institution serves both individual and business customers in their community and surrounding areas, positioning itself as a locally-focused alternative to larger national banks. The company emphasizes personal relationships and prompt decision-making by bank officers with individual lending authority. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of products including real estate/mortgage lending, installment loans, business checking accounts, personal banking products, mobile banking applications, and digital tools like Zelle for money transfers. Their mortgage services include an Online Mortgage Center and a dedicated Home Loan Center (888-701-1040) to assist with home financing. They provide eStatements for paperless banking, check ordering through Deluxe, and financial education resources covering safety, teaching kids about money, and other consumer topics. Community Bank & Trust distinguishes itself through localized service delivery with accessible branch locations where customers can speak directly with loan officers. They emphasize a straightforward mortgage process with various product options tailored to individual borrower needs, and they actively promote modern digital conveniences like mobile banking, Zelle integration, and responsive web design alongside traditional banking services. The company maintains accessibility standards (AudioEye enabled website) and provides security features including secure contact forms and fraud prevention notifications. The bank's competitive positioning relies heavily on community presence and personalized service rather than emphasizing competitive rates or special promotions.
services: Real estate/mortgage lending with customized products for different borrower needs
Online Mortgage Center for remote mortgage applications and processing
Installment loans for personal purchases, vehicles, and other needs
Business checking accounts with options for different business sizes
Mobile banking application with responsive website design
Zelle money transfer integration for sending and receiving funds online
Check ordering through Deluxe check printer
Secure online contact form for sensitive communications
Home Loan Center support via phone (888-701-1040)
Personal and business banking with branch locations
pros: Multiple branch locations with accessible loan officers who have decision-making authority for individual loan approvals
Dedicated Home Loan Center (888-701-1040) specifically for mortgage inquiries with an Online Mortgage Center for convenience
Offers both personal installment loans and mortgages allowing customers to shop rates before signing with dealers or retailers
Modern digital capabilities including responsive mobile banking app, Zelle integration, and eStatements
Business checking accounts available in multiple tiers to accommodate different business sizes
Accessible website design with AudioEye toolbar support and commitment to accessibility standards
Financial education resources provided for customers covering safety and financial literacy topics
cons: Website lacks specific information about interest rates, APRs, or fee structures for any loan products
No details provided about minimum account balances, loan amounts, or qualification requirements
Limited information about business loan options beyond business checking accounts mentioned
Website does not clearly specify service area or geographic locations of branches
No information about alternative lending products, investment services, or wealth management offerings
best_for: Local community members seeking personalized mortgage and home lending with direct access to loan officers
Small to medium-sized business owners needing customized business checking and lending solutions
Customers preferring traditional bank relationships combined with modern digital banking conveniences
Borrowers who want to compare loan rates from a local bank before accepting dealership or retailer financing
diagnosis: Community Bank & Trust is best suited for consumers who value localized banking relationships and direct access to loan officers, particularly for mortgages and installment loans. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal transparency on interest rates, fees, account requirements, and specific loan terms, making it difficult to assess competitive positioning or qualify for products without direct contact.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Community Bank & Trust is a full-service bank offering personal and business banking products including mortgages, loans, and checking.
